ValidationRule.description: Primary and Secondary Solutions are mandatory upon creation
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISNEW(), ISBLANK(TEXT(Primary_Solution__c)), OR( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'SDR', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'AE', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Chat', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Inside_Sales', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'MIR_Handover' ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Primary Solution and Secondary Solution cannot be empty. Please populate fields to proceed further.
